Internal audit plan the initial and core link internal audit, its effective formulationis important prerequisite improve the internal audit’s quality and ensure effectiveoperation the internal audit work.
With the gradual promotion risk-oriented internalaudit, International Internal Audit Standards proposed new requirements for theformulation the internal audit plan—risk-oriented development the internal audit plan.But currently most internal audit plan enterprise formulating randomly, lack ofreasonable assessment methods, even ignoring the risk assessment link planning.
Theycause that the internal audit resources figurate effectively based the results the riskassessment.
Therefore, the integration risk assessment method applying the formulationof the internal audit plan very important.Firstly, this article defines the connotation the internal audit plan, and then analysisthe situation and exiting problems based the relational theory, finds that the internalaudit plan formulation exists several problems followed: lack risk managementconcept, dual planning motivation, lack scientific and rational audit plan basis, contentsfocused financial aspects, lack independent department, lack highly qualified staff.These problem

have greatly restricted the effectiveness audit planning.
Focusing onthese inadequacies, this article further proposes the introduction integrated riskassessment method internal audit planning innovative audit planning ideas andimprove the audit planning, and then elaborates the specific application this riskassessment method based actual cases, testes the rationality this method.
Finally, thisarticle proposes several safeguards improve the internal audit planning.
Thesesafeguards include conceptual basis, institution, organization, quality personal andtechnical approach.

You may obtain comparable sales information from records the Assessor's Office through the Assessor's Website, from realtors, title companies.
The best sales comparisons are sales the subject property was true "open market" sale.
The best comparable sales similar properties located your area neighborhood, with similar land and improvement features, that sold close the valuation date issue (January the current year).
Comparable properties not have exactly match your property.
Look for sales that are most similar, note their differences, and identify superior and inferior property features.
This comparison process should enable you determine whether your property would sell for more than less than the price paid for each selected sale, leading you market value estimate.

This thesis examines the work reformer Lugenia Burns Hope and her community organization, the Neighborhood Union, case study unpack scholarly characterizations black elite uplift strategies during the early <hide>th century.
The Neighborhood Union was established <hide> Atlanta Hope and women from the community build stronger neighborhoods and combat the deleterious effects the <hide> Race Riots and Jim Crow laws.
Neighborhood Union settlement houses provided basic and extracurricular services, including kindergartens for working mothers, vocational classes, and lecture series.
The organization’s exceptional, multi-class leadership structure enabled members the black poor and working classes lead their own projects with the assistance Neighborhood Union resources.
Hope’s background provides evidence against broad generalizations the black elite paternalistic, and her vision creating democratic communities that diminished class barriers provides counter narrative characterizations clubwomen and the black elite engaging respectability politics their social work.
Understood within its historical and sociopolitical context, Hope’s life and work also challenge mainstream narratives the Progressive Era and the Social Gospe
